input: Show revenue for the past 12 months.

understanding.summary: Metric: Revenue | Dimension: Month | Comparison: None

chart_recommendation.reason: trend analysis maps best to line visualization.

result.generated_sql:
SELECT month, SUM(revenue) AS total_revenue
FROM sales
GROUP BY month
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10

structured_sql.sql:
SELECT district,
       EXTRACT(MONTH FROM order_date) AS time_period,
       SUM(sales_amount) AS total_revenue
FROM sales
GROUP BY district, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM order_date)
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10

query_graph.compiled_sql:
SELECT district,
       MONTH(order_date) AS time_period,
       SUM(sales_amount) AS metric_value
FROM sales
GROUP BY district, MONTH(order_date)
ORDER BY district, time_period
insight_hints: Analyzing revenue broken down by district.
Temporal resolution is month — aggregating data at the month level.
Returning the top 10 results ranked by revenue.
followup_questions: Which district had the fastest growth this quarter?

       MONTH(order_date) AS time_period,
       SUM(sales_amount) AS metric_value
FROM sales
GROUP BY district, MONTH(order_date)
ORDER BY district, time_period
insight_hints: Analyzing revenue broken down by district.
Temporal resolution is month — aggregating data at the month level.
Returning the top 10 results ranked by revenue.
followup_questions: Which district had the fastest growth this quarter?
query_graph.explanation: This query measures revenue grouped by district. Data is aggregated at the month level. Results are limited to the top 10 rows.

business_logic_rules: Only approved read-safe SQL can execute.

understanding.summary: Metric: Revenue | Dimension: Month | Comparison: None

result.generated_sql:
SELECT month, SUM(revenue) AS total_revenue
FROM sales
GROUP BY month
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10

structured_sql.sql:
SELECT district,
       EXTRACT(MONTH FROM order_date) AS time_period,
       SUM(sales_amount) AS total_revenue
FROM sales
GROUP BY district, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM order_date)
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10

query_graph.compiled_sql:
SELECT district,
       MONTH(order_date) AS time_period,
       SUM(sales_amount) AS metric_value
FROM sales
GROUP BY district, MONTH(order_date)
ORDER BY district, time_period
insight_hints: Analyzing revenue broken down by district.
Temporal resolution is month — aggregating data at the month level.
Returning the top 10 results ranked by revenue.
followup_questions: Which district had the fastest growth this quarter?
query_graph.explanation: This query measures revenue grouped by district. Data is aggregated at the month level. Results are limited to the top 10 rows.

LIMIT 10

       EXTRACT(MONTH FROM order_date) AS time_period,
       SUM(sales_amount) AS total_revenue
FROM sales
GROUP BY district, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM order_date)
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 10

query_graph.compiled_sql:
SELECT district,
       MONTH(order_date) AS time_period,
       SUM(sales_amount) AS metric_value
FROM sales
GROUP BY district, MONTH(order_date)
ORDER BY district, time_period
insight_hints: Analyzing revenue broken down by district.
Temporal resolution is month — aggregating data at the month level.
Returning the top 10 results ranked by revenue.
followup_questions: Which district had the fastest growth this quarter?
query_graph.explanation: This query measures revenue grouped by district. Data is aggregated at the month level. Results are limited to the top 10 rows.

query_graph.compiled_sql:
SELECT district,
       MONTH(order_date) AS time_period,
       SUM(sales_amount) AS metric_value
FROM sales
GROUP BY district, MONTH(order_date)
ORDER BY district, time_period
insight_hints: Analyzing revenue broken down by district.
Temporal resolution is month — aggregating data at the month level.
Returning the top 10 results ranked by revenue.
followup_questions: Which district had the fastest growth this quarter?

query_graph.compiled_sql:
SELECT district,
       MONTH(order_date) AS time_period,
       SUM(sales_amount) AS metric_value
FROM sales
GROUP BY district, MONTH(order_date)
ORDER BY district, time_period
insight_hints: Analyzing revenue broken down by district.
Temporal resolution is month — aggregating data at the month level.
Returning the top 10 results ranked by revenue.
followup_questions: Which district had the fastest growth this quarter?
query_graph.explanation: This query measures revenue grouped by district. Data is aggregated at the month level. Results are limited to the top 10 rows.

business_logic_rules: Only approved read-safe SQL can execute.

result.generated_sql:
SELECT district,
       EXTRACT(YEAR FROM order_date) AS year,
       SUM(sales_amount) AS metric_value,
       (SUM(sales_amount) - LAG(SUM(sales_amount)) OVER (PARTITION BY district ORDER BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM order_date))) AS yoy_delta
FROM sales
GROUP BY district, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM order_date)
ORDER BY district, year

structured_sql.sql:

       EXTRACT(YEAR FROM order_date) AS year,
       SUM(sales_amount) AS total_sales,
       (SUM(sales_amount) - LAG(SUM(sales_amount)) OVER (PARTITION BY district ORDER BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM order_date))) AS yoy_delta
FROM sales
GROUP BY district, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM order_date)
ORDER BY district, year

chart_recommendation.reason: comparison analysis maps best to bar visualization.

result.generated_sql:
SELECT district,
       EXTRACT(YEAR FROM order_date) AS year,
       SUM(sales_amount) AS metric_value,
       (SUM(sales_amount) - LAG(SUM(sales_amount)) OVER (PARTITION BY district ORDER BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM order_date))) AS yoy_delta
FROM sales
GROUP BY district, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM order_date)
ORDER BY district, year

structured_sql.sql:
SELECT district,
       EXTRACT(YEAR FROM order_date) AS year,
       SUM(sales_amount) AS total_revenue,
       (SUM(sales_amount) - LAG(SUM(sales_amount)) OVER (PARTITION BY district ORDER BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM order_date))) AS yoy_delta
FROM sales
GROUP BY district, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM order_date)
ORDER BY district, year

query_graph.compiled_sql:
SELECT district,
       YEAR(order_date) AS year,
       SUM(sales_amount) AS metric_value,
       (SUM(sales_amount) - LAG(SUM(sales_amount)) OVER (
           PARTITION BY district
           ORDER BY YEAR(order_date)
       )) AS yoy_delta
FROM sales
GROUP BY district, YEAR(order_date)
ORDER BY district, year
insight_hints: Analyzing revenue broken down by district.
Applying YoY period-over-period comparison to detect growth or decline.
Temporal resolution is year — aggregating data at the year level.
Returning the top 10 results ranked by revenue.
followup_questions: Which district had the fastest growth this quarter?
query_graph.explanation: This query measures revenue grouped by district. It applies a YoY comparison to track changes over time. Data is aggregated at the year level. Results are limited to the top 10 rows.

business_logic_rules: Only approved read-safe SQL can execute.
High-risk operations require governance approval.

query_graph.compiled_sql:
SELECT district,
       MONTH(order_date) AS time_period,
       COUNT(order_id) AS metric_value
FROM sales
GROUP BY district, MONTH(order_date)
ORDER BY district, time_period
insight_hints: Analyzing orders broken down by district.
Temporal resolution is month — aggregating data at the month level.
Returning the top 10 results ranked by orders.
followup_questions: Which district had the fastest growth this quarter?
query_graph.explanation: This query measures orders grouped by district. Data is aggregated at the month level. Results are limited to the top 10 rows.

       EXTRACT(MONTH FROM order_date) AS time_period,
       SUM(sales_amount) AS total_sales
FROM sales
GROUP BY district, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM order_date)
ORDER BY total_sales DESC
LIMIT 10
